message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #9a9a9a
  LifeLineBorderThickness 1
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ParticipantBorderColor #7f7f7f
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #d9d9e6
  ParticipantFontColor black
  ActorBorderColor #7f7f7f
  ActorBackgroundColor #d9d9e6
  ArrowColor #333333
  MessageAlign left
  BoxBorderColor #bfbfbf
  BoxBackgroundColor #ffffff
  NoteBorderColor #bfbf8a
  NoteBackgroundColor #ffffe0
}
hide footbox

participant "AbstractApplicationContext" as AAC
participant "GenericApplicationContext" as GAC
participant "ApplicationContextAwareProcessor" as ACAP
participant "AbstractAutowireCapableBeanFactory" as AABF
participant "DefaultListableBeanFactory" as DLBF

note left of AAC
以下流程都在refresh()方法内部
end note

note left of AAC
第1步
end note

AAC -> AAC : 1 prepareRefresh
activate AAC
AAC -> AAC : initPropertySources()
note left of AAC
空方法 留给子类重写
end note
AAC -> AAC : getEnvironment()
AAC -> AAC : validateRequiredProperties()
AAC -> AAC : new LinkedHashSet<>()
note left of AAC
泛型ApplicationEvent
end note
deactivate AAC

note left of AAC
第2步
end note

AAC -> AAC : 2 obtainFreshBeanFactory()
activate AAC
AAC -> GAC : refreshBeanFactory()
activate GAC
GAC -> DLBF : new DefaultListableBeanFactory()
activate DLBF
DLBF -> DLBF : setSerializationId(getId())
deactivate DLBF
deactivate GAC

AAC <-- GAC : 未定义变量接收返回值
AAC -> GAC : getBeanFactory
GAC --> AAC : 返回 DefaultListableBeanFactory
deactivate AAC

note left of AAC
第3步
end note

AAC -> AAC : 3 prepareBeanFactory
activate AAC

note left of AAC
设置BeanFactory的类加载器、支持表达式解析器
end note

note left of AAC
添加Bean后置处理器 例如
end note

AAC -> AABF : addBeanPostProcessor(new ApplicationContextAwareProcessor(this))
activate AABF
AABF -> ACAP : 构造器
activate ACAP
deactivate ACAP
AABF --> AAC : 返回 ApplicationContextAwareProcessor
deactivate AABF

note left of AAC
设置忽略的自动装配的接口 例如
end note

AAC -> AABF : ignoreDependencyInterface(ApplicationEventPublisherAware.class)
activate AABF
AABF -> AABF : ignoredDependencyInterfaces.add(ifc)
deactivate AABF
AAC <-- AABF : 未定义变量接收返回值

note left of AAC
注册可以解析的自动装配 例如
end note

AAC -> DLBF : registerResolvableDependency(BeanFactory.class, beanFactory)
activate DLBF
note left of DLBF
params { dependencyType, autowiredValue }
end note
DLBF -> DLBF : resolvableDependencies.put();
deactivate DLBF
AAC <-- DLBF : 未定义变量接收返回值

note left of AAC
添加ApplicationListenerDetector的Bean后置处理器
end note
note left of AAC
添加编译时的AspectJ；
end note
note left of AAC
给BeanFactory中注册一些能用的组件
end note

AAC -> DLBF : registerSingleton(ENVIRONMENT_BEAN_NAME / SYSTEM_PROPERTIES_BEAN_NAME / SYSTEM_ENVIRONMENT_BEAN_NAME)
activate DLBF
note left of DLBF
params{beanName, singletonObject}
end note
DLBF -> DLBF : addSingleton();
deactivate DLBF
AAC <-- DLBF : 未定义变量接收返回值

deactivate AAC

note left of AAC
第4步
end note

note left of AAC
在应用程序上下文的标准初始化之后修改其内部bean工厂
end note

AAC -> AAC : postProcessBeanFactory(beanFactory);
note left of AAC
空方法 留给子类重写
end note

@enduml
